title: glycoxylon inophyllum
intro: Glycoxylon inophyllum, also known as the Ceylon ironwood, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka. Its bark, leaves, and seeds contain various bioactive compounds that exhibit medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Glycoxylon inophyllum include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
